docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS YING RU AND MENG MA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WEI FENG AND LILY CHAN ARE NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WEI FENG, LILY CHAN IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS YING RU AND MENG MA APPEARED, WITH ASSISTANCE OF MANDARIN INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS. DEFENDANST WEI FENG AND LILY CHAN APPEARED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED. COURT PROCEEDS WITH TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
